summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend smoke testing of Ajo Platform MVP. 21/21 pytest backend tests passed covering auth, groups, members, payments approval/rejection, payout confirmation, dashboard stats, audit logs, notifications, and visibility-request workflow. Frontend landing, login, admin dashboard and Create-group modal verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS middleware uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True which is invalid per spec (browsers ignore). allow_origin_regex='.*' saves it but explicit origin list is safer for production.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends lockout after 5 failed attempts).
Password min-length / complexity not validated in RegisterIn (accepts any string).
seed_admin on startup only inserts if not exists; if ADMIN_PASSWORD env changes, existing hash won't update (playbook recommends idempotent update).
server.py is a single 637-line file; consider splitting into routers (auth/groups/payments/admin) for maintainability.
/api/admin/payments/{id}/decision does not guard against re-deciding an already-decided payment (idempotency).
/api/admin/payouts/{group_id}/{cycle_no}/confirm has no check that all contributions for that cycle have been approved before marking payout completed.
test_credentials: Admin admin@ajo.com/admin123 (seeded) works. Test members created dynamically via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_member_<ts>@ajo.com, TEST_other_<ts>@ajo.com members and TEST_Group_<ts> group during pytest run; data left in DB (non-destructive test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py covers full happy path + RBAC. Admin login uses data-testid: login-email, login-password, login-submit. Register uses register-name, register-email, register-password (no data-testid on submit button). Create group modal opens via data-testid containing 'create-group'. Frontend landing uses 'Create member account' and 'Admin sign in' CTAs (not 'Sign up'/'Login'). Auth cookie is httpOnly + SameSite=None + Secure, so session works only over HTTPS preview URL.
